sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71054" key="nosoergo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νοσο-εργός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n71054.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">causing sickness,</tr_> Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0004.tlg001.perseus-grc1:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
